title: Juemare Gosh I Remember This Here Is
sourceTitle: Juemare Gosh I Remember This Here Is
prompt: A kitsune fox: Kitsune art features the mythical Japanese nine-tailed fox, symbolizing intelligence, magic, and shape-shifting abilities. These artworks often depict graceful, spiritual foxes with multiple tails in enchanted, autumnal, or traditional Japanese settings, often incorporating elements like foxfire, masks, and jewels. Popular styles include digital fantasy, anime, and minimalist, with themes of transformation, folklore, and divinity. --ar 3:4 --profile 9nv6snq dmnc3tf nj4ajrt 362c2i1 dbkgol8 6lf6sa2 yagbqan 827b1ig 5uz2kfv 8hhmjfp eynj9qn fey4r6j klxqom5 f31jlp1
